headline: Bitcoin climbs above $72K following March's hot inflation data
summary: Cryptocurrency bitcoin (BTC-USD) is holding above $72,000 per token on Friday. Market Catalysts Host Julie Hyman takes a closer look at the broad crypto market and how crypto-related stocks are trading on the backdrop of March's Consumer Price Index (CPI), which illustrated hotter-than-expected inflation moves.

headline: How Investors May Respond To PayPal Holdings (PYPL) Embedding Payment Links Into Canva And Meta Shopping
summary: In early April 2026, PayPal announced that PayPal Payment Links is now embedded directly into Canva, giving its 265 million monthly users the ability to turn any design into a checkout-ready asset without needing a website, while also partnering with Meta to power one-tap purchases on Facebook and, soon, Instagram. By moving payments directly into the creative and social workflows of Canva and Meta’s platforms, PayPal is positioning itself deeper inside the creator and social commerce...
